Tests for the `strftime` function and build script for time-related components.


## Files
- **[test_strftime.c](test_strftime.c.md)**: Tests for the `strftime` function, including handling of various extensions, bugs, and internationalization.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing time-related components in the pebble-firmware project.
